title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Manipal Hospitals

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Manipal Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
We at Manipal Hospitals are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Manipal Hospitals:
Manipal Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Hospitals!
